data.title: A Multicenter, Efficacy and Safety Study of Methotrexate to Increase Response Rates in Patients With Uncontrolled Gout Receiving KRYSTEXXA® (Pegloticase) (MIRROR Open-Label [OL])
data.brief_summary: The overall objective of the study is to assess the efficacy, safety, tolerability, and pharmacokinetics (PK) of the concomitant use of pegloticase with methotrexate (MTX) to enhance the response rate seen with pegloticase alone in adults with uncontrolled gout.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

1. Willing and able to give informed consent.
2. Willing and able to comply with the prescribed treatment protocol and evaluations for the duration of the study.
3. Adult men or women ≥18 to ≤65 years of age.

endpoints: Percentage of Serum Uric Acid (sUA < 6 mg/dL) Responders During Month 6
